title: Smoky Dense Adventurous Uruguayan Sausage Fondue
description: A smoky and dense fondue dish featuring Uruguayan sausage, perfect for adventurous foodies. This dairy-free friendly dish is sure to impress.

ingredients.name: Uruguayan Sausages
ingredients.notes: Smoked and spicy sausages, preferably choripan or similar.

ingredients.name: Red Wine Vinegar
ingredients.notes: Or substitute with apple cider vinegar.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large fondue pot over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until they start to caramelize, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Uruguayan sausages and cook for 2-3 minutes, until browned on all sides.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the red wine vinegar and olive tapenade, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and a side of crusty bread for dipping.
For an added kick, serve with hot sauce on the side.
